name: EXFO Evolver
description: Continuous active probe platform for 5G SA, slicing, and end-to-end service testing. Deploys software probes on standard hardware across the network footprint.
howItWorks: Evolver runs synthetic transactions — voice calls, data sessions, video streams — from fixed probe nodes distributed across the network. It measures what a real subscriber would experience: call setup time, throughput, latency, video MOS. Results are compared against baselines and SLA thresholds in real time.
